verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our God He lives forever, He reigns in power and love. Let Earth bow down before Him. For He is exalted.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We look to Yahweh Yahweh Forever Yahweh Yahweh

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our hope is God Almighty. His love is greater than all. Lift high the God of Heaven. Give all the honor

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We look to Yahweh Yahweh Our hope is Yahweh Yahweh.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And He shall reign forever He shall reign forever He shall reign Forever and ever (our God)
